summary: Iteration 12: Infographic Image Generation feature tested successfully. Backend returns imageKeyword field in infographic sections, /api/generate-image endpoint with layout='infographic' generates compressed JPEG images (~52KB), and frontend correctly imports and uses renderInfographicWithImages utility for export with progress toasts.
passed_tests: 2. GET /api/sources - 3 indexed sources available (SOW-H@H, H@H Phased Scope, Slide Deck)
3. POST /api/generate with output_type='infographic' - Returns 7 sections with imageKeyword field
4. Each infographic section contains imageKeyword with contextual phrase (e.g., 'home hospital care', 'integrated clinical platform')
5. POST /api/generate-image with layout='infographic' - Returns success=true with imageBase64
6. Generated image is compressed JPEG ~52KB (within expected range)
8. Frontend: App loads correctly with renderInfographicWithImages import
9. Frontend: Studio panel shows Infographic generation tool
10. Frontend: Infographic output card visible in Generated Outputs
11. Frontend: Export button triggers image generation workflow
12. Frontend: Progress toast shows 'Generating 6 infographic images — please wait...'
14. Frontend: Infographic PNG downloads successfully after image generation
critical_code_review_comments: infographicRenderer.js (line 90-127): renderInfographicWithImages correctly generates AI images for max 6 sections sequentially with progress toasts
infographicRenderer.js (line 102-111): fetch call to /api/generate-image includes image_keyword parameter from section.imageKeyword
server.py (line 912-953): Infographic prompt includes imageKeyword field in JSON output schema
server.py (line 1069-1087): /api/generate-image endpoint accepts image_keyword parameter and passes to generate_slide_image
NotebookLM_Workspace.jsx (line 4): renderInfographicWithImages correctly imported from utils/infographicRenderer
NotebookLM_Workspace.jsx (line 1403-1410): Export handler calls renderInfographicWithImages for infographic type
seed_data_creation: Used existing indexed sources: SOW-H@H, H@H Phased Scope, Slide Deck (Health Intelligence Workspace)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Infographic image generation feature fully tested. Backend /api/generate with output_type='infographic' returns sections with imageKeyword field. /api/generate-image with layout='infographic' generates compressed JPEG (~40-60KB). Frontend renderInfographicWithImages utility in /app/frontend/src/utils/infographicRenderer.js generates images sequentially (up to 6) showing progress toasts, then renders Canvas infographic and exports as PNG. Export takes ~60-90 seconds for full infographic with 6 images.

verified_features.imageKeyword_in_infographic_sections: Working - Each section has contextual imageKeyword (2-4 word phrase)
verified_features.image_generation_infographic_layout: Working - /api/generate-image accepts layout='infographic' and image_keyword param
verified_features.frontend_import: Working - renderInfographicWithImages imported in NotebookLM_Workspace.jsx line 4
verified_features.export_progress_toasts: Working - Shows 'Generating X infographic images' and sequential progress
verified_features.png_download: Working - Canvas infographic exported as PNG blob download
